title: Workflow v1 Self-Optimization — fix issues found by Observer

reviewerA.focus: orchestrator logic correctness, test coverage, no regression

reviewerB.focus: cron job integration, state persistence, operational reliability

escalationReviewer.focus: architecture, data flow, sprint orchestration compatibility

context: === SELf-OPTIMIZATION SPRINT ===
This sprint fixes the AI Sprint Orchestrator's own workflow infrastructure.
The goal is to close the broken loop: Observer finds issues → this sprint fixes them.
=== SOURCE OF TRUTH ===
Read ops/ai-sprints/self-optimization-status.json for the list of pending fixes.
Each pending fix has: id, issue, category, severity, description, status.
=== RECENT OBSERVER REPORTS (for context) ===
~/.hermes/cron/output/6cb6476462c5/ — all observer reports with Failure Classification and Next Action sections.
=== CODE TO MODIFY ===
scripts/ai-sprint-orchestrator/run.mjs — main orchestrator
scripts/ai-sprint-orchestrator/lib/decision.mjs — decision engine
scripts/ai-sprint-orchestrator/lib/task-specs.mjs — spec loading + path mapping
=== CRON JOBS TO UPDATE ===
The cron job 'workflow-v1-high-frequency-observer' (6cb6476462c5) prompt needs update to write to self-optimization-status.json.
The cron job 'workflow-v1-low-frequency-executor' (b408d24259a5) prompt needs to read self-optimization-status.json.
Use 'hermes cron' CLI or update the cron job via the Hermes agent.
=== SCOPE BOUNDARIES ===
Fix orchestrator infrastructure and cron job coordination ONLY.
Do NOT fix agent behavior (model output, prompt quality, etc.).
Do NOT modify OpenClaw or openclaw-plugin.
Do NOT change product features — only workflow reliability.
Do NOT re-architect beyond what's needed.
=== VERIFICATION ===
After each fix: run `node --test scripts/ai-sprint-orchestrator/test/` — must pass.
Update self-optimization-status.json: mark resolved fixes, record sprint outcome.

investigate: For each open issue, confirm it still exists on current HEAD.
Prioritize: which fix gives most reliability improvement per line of code changed?
patch-plan: Produce minimal repair plan for top 1-2 confirmed issues.
Define exact file paths, lines, and test updates.
Define rollback boundary for each fix.
implement-pass-1: Run all 3 test suites — must pass.
implement-pass-2: Do not expand scope beyond patch-plan.
verify: Verify fixes with evidence: test output, code diffs, state machine behavior.
Update self-optimization-status.json: write result to lastSprintResult, mark fixes as resolved.
Merge gate: confirm local SHA matches remote branch.

investigateHypotheses: Observer and Executor share no state — fixable by writing structured issues to self-optimization-status.json
Executor iteration budget (50) is insufficient for diagnose+fix+test cycle — fixable by changing cron job prompt to do only one thing per run
Scheduler blindly retries without backoff — fixable by adding consecutive failure counter and auto-pause logic
No verification mechanism after fix — fixable by having next Observer run verify the specific pending fix
